column31: • Butchers generated the highest sales revenue among all product categories.
• Furniture was the most frequently purchased product category.
• Online sales slightly outperformed In-store sales.
• Customers using discounts spent slightly more on average than customers without discounts.
• Cash was the most preferred payment method among customers.
• Milk Products and Patisserie showed comparatively lower sales performance.
• Increase promotions and targeted offers for low-performing categories such as Milk Products and Patisserie.
• Introduce loyalty programs and personalized discounts to improve repeat purchases.
• Focus marketing efforts on top-performing products to maximize revenue growth.
• Encourage digital payment adoption through cashback or reward incentives.
• Improve customer engagement through personalized recommendations and seasonal campaigns.
